/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/MO PC 1385:VICTIM & WITNESS NOT AVAILABE - PEOPLEUNABLE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN/X:IF THE PEOPLE REFILE CASE, DEFENSE COUNSEL WILL ARRANGE TO SURRENDER DEFENDANT/ /BE/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:PUBLIC DEFENDER DECLARES CONFLICT AND IS RELEIVED/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/CON:MICHAEL WHELAN/STWPX/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/X:REVISED TIME ESTIMATE IS 1 DAY/X:STIPULATION, PURSUANT TO 1516 EC, MEDICAL RECORDS MAY BE REVIEWED BYTHE COURT RE CONFIDENTIALITY ISSUES AND THEN RELEASED TO MS, MORENO TO BE COPIED AND RETURNED TO THE COURT/X:LATER, THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED MEDICAL RECORDS FROM SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL, ORDERED THAT PERSONAL INFORMATION CONTAINED IN THE MEDICAL RECORDSSHALL BE PLACED IN A SEALED, CONFIDENTIAL ENVELOPE/X:THE COURT ORDERED MINUTES OF THE IN CAMERA HEARING SEALED/
/CAL:PHC & TO SET & MOT RET PROP/MO GRTD/X:JOHN SHARLEY FROM SFPD PRESENT/CONTD TO BE SET, DOP /CONTD:TO SET/DOP/X:WILL BE DEPT,20 CASE, TIME ESTIMATE OF 2 DAYS/
/CAL:MOT TO ACCEPT PROP BOND IN LIEU OF BAIL/MO GRTD/X:THE COURT FINDS THEVALUE OF EQUITY IN THE PROPERTY IS IN EXCESS OF $160,000/X:THE PHC & TO SET DATE OF 09-28-06 IS CONFIRMED/DOP/
/CAL AN/TEXT DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/X10 AND 60 DAYS WAIVERS/987,2/BAIL:80000/X:REQUEST FOR O,R, DENIED,/SA1:JOSE VELASQUEZ/WEAP/
